title: What the 2026 World Cup is revealing about the future of product identification
summary: Supply chain resilience increasingly depends on the ability to coordinate accurate product data across every site, trading partner, and customer - creating a connected ecosystem in which product identity can be shared, trusted, and acted upon seamlessly.
